# ProgressRateLimiter constructor

Creates a limiter with the given minimum interval between emissions for the same token.

```csharp
public ProgressRateLimiter(long intervalMs = 100)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| intervalMs | The minimum milliseconds between successive emissions per token. Defaults to 100 ms (RC-3). |
